{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320180294E5483C4B7D885CE6B6"}"},"total":88},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7178865771903320843","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是好看的，尽管感觉天赋技能特别强了，但一点也不影响难度平衡，不是那种单靠外挂就能在诡异面前无敌的设定，还是有不少斗智斗勇的感觉的，期待第二个副本结束，期待一下搞事精奈亚，养肥到第二个副本结束再来看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671460065,"group_id":"7157555958065925157","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw3pqNyXviuqR0OIz8BmQNA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"102813937304","user_name":"伴月群岛的卡里克"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102813937304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7157555958065925157","book_info":{"abstract":"（【克系宇宙】+【规则怪谈】+【国运】+【无女主】+【少量直播内容】）
（名字作者脑抽乱取的，主要结合规则怪谈和克苏鲁神话。）
诡秘降临，万籁俱寂，惶惶其日，何有终时？
我死了，我又活了？
被车撞死的李志无意间被诡秘空间吞噬，成为了龙国的冒险者。在诡秘空间的规则之下，李志与龙国的命运紧紧相连。
他胜，则国昌；
他败，则国衰！
诡秘空间会吞噬蓝星上的一切——文化、气运、领地.......并将之结合，成为新的诡秘空间。冒险者们前仆后继，为的，就是将失去的一切夺回来！
在众目睽睽下，李志将保持理智，寻找规则与线索，在诡秘空间的副本中，向死而生！而第一个副本，就是至今尚未有人通关的S级副本【极寒远征】。
“.......欢迎参加本次远征极寒之地的挑战，您将见识那茫茫北原生物以及幽蓝深邃碧海，它们会对这次远征带来不一般的体验。当然越过了极线圈后，您将有机会亲眼目睹极寒之地中的极端天气以及神秘生物，这些存在将会给您带来深刻的印象......”
“.......本次远征由塞特爵士及其名下罐头工业赞助，为了保护您在本次远征中尽可能不受伤害，请您务必要遵守以下几个规则......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o16dd0ad6b9824e9c4f6c1a74aa5caea5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"躺赢的廖","author_id":"","book_id":"7157555958065925157","book_name":"规则怪谈：这是克苏鲁神话的世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7157559012538614307","read_count":"381","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"615992"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"288","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,克苏鲁,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/853ebf91d22ffd25bda700e1319daeb3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452282&x-signature=y5fkvA%2BDyz5l%2Fn%2FY0eGOevWnFAs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4353669814559976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.826125e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320180294E5483C4B7D885CE6B6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1826,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5884},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1671502422,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7188016641467777825","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书对于一些新入坑的萌新来说是有些烧脑的，也比较容易劝退，但是如果能够静下心来细细评读，也能够感受到作者对于细节的刻画，和对逻辑严谨性的考量，剧情的发展也是合情合理，可以让读者感受出伏笔，但又感觉的不那么真切，似有似无的铺垫确实是恰到好处，值得这个五星！希望作者的文章能够吸引更多的读者[吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673590682,"group_id":"7157555958065925157","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9szbGrL6271WmL1OqPieDbYozopDdVF8yy0roT6POC2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4020264278702124","user_name":"往事随风意随痕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4020264278702124","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7157555958065925157","book_info":{"abstract":"（【克系宇宙】+【规则怪谈】+【国运】+【无女主】+【少量直播内容】）
